summary: Re-embed cleaned chunks via embed_corpus.py; verify chunk_embeddings coverage and dim
description: Re-run embed_corpus.py over all changed chunks (or full corpus if simpler). Verify chunk_embeddings row count == 4,176 and dim == 768 corpus-wide. This is the clean-body re-embed the design doc cites as todo:b80d8d7d (that id is not in this repo's store; this ticket is its realization).

resolution.note: Full corpus re-embedded over cleaned bodies via embed_corpus.py --reindex (ollama/nomic-embed-text, local): 4,176/4,176 embedded, 0 errors. Verified chunk_embeddings: 4,176 rows, dim uniformly 768, single model tag. This realizes the 'b80d8d7d clean-body re-embed' the design doc cites.
